claims.claim: Quote: 'A model that performs well Friday night can be unusable Monday morning... This volatility is the real enemy.'
claims.found: "A model that performs well Friday night can be unusable Monday morning." **This volatility is the real enemy.**
Tracked GPT-4o mini over 7 days: latency unstable.

claims.claim: Same pattern across all Azure OpenAI regions, varying independently
claims.found: Same pattern across all Azure OpenAI regions; they vary independently.

claims.claim: Brute-force race: all 40+ deployments, take first, 40x token cost, unacceptable
claims.found: Send every request to all 40+ Azure OpenAI deployments, use first to respond. Latency-optimal but **40x token cost. Unacceptable.**

claims.claim: Polling: probe each deployment every 10 min with cheap single-token request (~$400/day), cache fastest in Redis, 5+ min spikes between polls
claims.found: Poll each deployment with a cheap single-token request (O(1) cost). Poll every 10 min (~$400/day). Store results in Redis... but **spikes lasting 5+ min** — when a deployment degraded between polls

claims.claim: Live data + exploration: update proxy list from live production latencies, detect spike next request rotate out; exploit-only failure (other 39 unmeasured) fixed by segmenting majority->fastest(exploit)/subset->explore = multi-armed bandit
claims.found: Use latency from **live production requests** to update the proxy list in real time -> detect spike on next request, rotate out... Fix = **segment traffic: majority -> current fastest (exploitation), small statistically-significant subset -> test others (exploration)** [multi-armed bandit].
code_refs: [] -- no code references to verify

claims.claim: LiveKit FallbackAdapter is ordered-list failover, not exploit/explore (cited re LAT-06)
claims.found: line 250 'for i, llm in enumerate(self._fallback_adapter._llm_instances):' iterates in order; lines 192/205/217 log 'switching to next LLM' on timeout/failure -- ordered failover, no exploration slice.

summary: All 8 checkable assertions verified against vapi-latency source and LiveKit clone. Every quote, number (7 days, 40+, 40x, 10 min, $400/day, 5+ min), and mechanism (bandit exploit/explore) matches the source verbatim. Cross-note FallbackAdapter claim confirmed against fallback_adapter.py.
